en.extract:
The pale-breasted illadopsis (Illadopsis rufipennis) is a species of bird in the family Pellorneidae. It is found throughout the  African tropical rainforest (including Bioko). The Tanzanian illadopsis was formerly considered a subspecies. Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical moist lowland forest and subtropical or tropical moist montane forest.

The '''pale-breasted illadopsis''' ('''''Illadopsis rufipennis''''') is a species of [[bird]] in the family [[Pellorneidae]]. It is found throughout the  [[Tropical forest|African tropical rainforest]] (including [[Bioko]]). The [[Tanzanian illadopsis]] was formerly considered a subspecies. Its natural [[habitat]]s are [[subtropical or tropical moist lowland forest]] and subtropical or tropical moist [[montane forest]].
